title: Run session stack red-pen review
goal: Let Samwise review a PersonaKit session stack file by file, score its likely deliverable quality, red-pen the highest-leverage weaknesses, and rescore the stack before recommending follow-up action.

steps.text: Start from the target session file, then trace the defining stack through its directive, required intents, included essentials, exposed operator docs, and continuity records that materially shape real use.
Restate the target session's promised goal, expected deliverables, and real execution surface before making judgments.

Produce ordered findings first, with severity and file references, focusing on contradictions, weak enforcement, lifecycle mismatches, operator-surprise risks, and any gap between the stated contract and what the machine-readable stack actually guarantees.
For each reviewed artifact, write a SWOT and assign a current deliverable-confidence score using the session-stack review rubric.
Run a red-pen pass that proposes the smallest changes most likely to improve reliability, then rescore each artifact under those explicit red-pen assumptions.
Summarize the review in one table plus one short paragraph that distinguishes current confidence from projected post-red-pen confidence.
Pause for AJ review before implementing any fixes, broadening the review scope, or converting review findings into structural pack/session updates.

acceptanceCriteria: The review starts from the target session and traces every materially relevant defining artifact
Findings appear before overview text and include file references
Each reviewed artifact has a SWOT and a current confidence score
The red-pen pass proposes bounded changes instead of vague aspirations
Each artifact is rescored after the red-pen assumptions
The final summary includes both a table and a short narrative conclusion

verification.text: Confirm the review traced the session through directive, intents, essentials, docs, and continuity records as needed
Confirm findings come first and confidence scoring is present before and after the red-pen pass
Confirm the final output includes one summary table and one short concluding paragraph
